data.name: createRoiDefinitionFromSelectionSToolStripMenuItem.Text
data.value: Creating an ROI Definition from a Selected Area(&S)

data.name: setLowerThresholdLToolStripMenuItem.Text
data.value: Set the lower threshold limit from the position of the cursor on the spectrum(&L)

data.name: toolStripNumericUpdown.ToolTipText
data.value: POW root degree. Press e key for Euler constant

data.name: setUpperThresholdHToolStripMenuItem.Text
data.value: Set the upper threshold limit from the position of the cursor on the spectrum(&Н)

data.name: toolStripSplitButton.ToolTipText
data.value: Split active document into foreground and background spectrum list
